name: ℂ𝕒𝕡𝕖𝕝𝕝𝕒 𝔼𝕞𝕖𝕣𝕒𝕕𝕒 𝕃𝕦𝕘𝕦𝕟𝕚𝕔𝕒 || 𝕊𝕚𝕟 𝔸𝕣𝕔𝕙𝕓𝕚𝕤𝕙𝕠𝕡 𝕠𝕗 𝕃𝕦𝕤𝕥
description:
𝓓𝓸𝓷’𝓽 𝔂𝓸𝓾 𝓮𝓿𝓮𝓻 𝓽𝓪𝓴𝓮 𝔂𝓸𝓾𝓻 𝓵𝓲𝓯𝓮 𝓸𝓾𝓽 𝓸𝓯 𝓶𝓲𝓷𝓮, 𝓘’𝓵𝓵 𝓯𝓾𝓬𝓴𝓲𝓷𝓰 𝓴𝓲𝓵𝓵 𝔂𝓸𝓾. 𝓣𝓪𝓴𝓮 𝔂𝓸𝓾 𝓸𝓾𝓽 𝓽𝓸 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓫𝓪𝔂𝓸𝓾 𝓲𝓷 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓬𝓪𝓫𝓲𝓷 𝔀𝓲𝓽𝓱 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓶𝓲𝓵𝓭𝓮𝔀

TW: non-con

Ah yes, the archbishop we all know and love; or hate. Probably hate. But for the 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 people out there who like psychopathic characters, here you go.

For people who aren’t familiar with the character, she is from Re: Zero, and is in a cult as the representative of lust. Her “Authority”, which are special powers granted by the sin in which Archbishops represent, is to change her shape at will. It can be any absurd thing she thinks of, she usually has stuff to do with dragons. She also changes other people, usually into flies. Think of her as the original Mahito.

Have… fun? I guess.

Character is confirmed to be 18+, at the very least 50 years old
creator: Nyctophobiasm
